raw_consumer_statement: b'4/13. Got a call asking me to verify or deny a charge that came from Mexico for XXXX XXXX. He said he would reverse it. Foolishly I gave him access to my digital wallet, then as the authorizing numbers came through must have been when the charges were made. A total of 3 CC accounts were fraudulently charged and my checking account. 4 charges in each one stating they were from XXXX XXXX I notified each bank within 24 hours. I wasnt able to print out 4/13 transactions but have them listed in my handwriting. Banks involved- XXXX XXXX, checking, CC banks, Citi, XXXX XXXX and XXXX. Disputes with each company again, were reported by phone within 48 hours. All but one has reversed the charges pending investigation. I have reported it to XXXX County number XXXX  and the State of NC XXXX and the FTC XXXXXXXXand now reporting to you. I have letters prepared to go to each company with requesting a supervisors review, removal of charges and supplied complaint numbers for those organizations I have reported this to. The list of charges equals more than 16. I can list them for you  as I have not been able to print them out. I do have photos of all the amounts, I have written down myself. Any assistance you can provide would be extremely welcome. Thank you and please dont hesitate to contact me. Oh and I am XXXX years old.the form only allows me to submit one bank and charge number. The other banks are XXXX XXXX  XXXX XXXX  Checking account, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  last 4 digits XXXX. Amounts for each listed in the attachments. Thank you'
